overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a medieval fantasy city with gray stone architecture and teal rooftops. The player navigates cobblestone streets, follows NPCs, and enters a covered archway passage in an overcast, atmospheric setting.

events.description: turns right from courtyard onto cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: standing in a stone courtyard then turning right to follow the street

entered.detail: large stone archway with columns leading to another section of the city
tall gray stone building with arched windows and weathered facade
massive stone structure with vertical columns and recessed doorways
distinctive blue-green spire visible above the archway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a stone courtyard surrounded by historic architecture. The player stands before a large central archway with a teal spire visible in the distance, then turns right onto a cobblestone street between imposing stone buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the street following two NPCs ahead

walking in same direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: stone balcony extending from the right building over the street
weathered wooden sign mounted on the left building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking down a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall stone buildings, following two NPCs walking ahead. An overhanging balcony extends from the right building, and a wooden sign hangs on the left wall as the street continues forward.

events.description: enters covered archway passage with overhead shelter

agents.ego_description: overtaking the NPCs and walking into a covered archway corridor

notable_agents.action: standing near the archway entrance as the player passes by

entered.detail: dark stone archway leading into a covered passage with overhead shelter
lit lantern hanging from a bracket on the left wall near the archway
series of stone archways forming a covered walkway on the left side

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering a covered stone archway passage. The player overtakes the NPCs and moves into a more enclosed space with a hanging iron lantern illuminating the entrance. The architecture shifts to a covered walkway with repeating stone arches on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open historic courtyard into a narrow, enclosed stone passage. It begins in a stone courtyard facing a large central archway with a distant teal spire, before turning right onto a cobblestone street flanked by imposing buildings. As the camera moves forward, it follows two NPCs past an overhanging balcony and a wooden wall sign, maintaining a steady pace through the narrow corridor. The scene then shifts as the player overtakes the NPCs and enters a covered stone archway, where the open sky is replaced by a sheltered walkway. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed, illuminated by a hanging iron lantern and defined by a series of repeating stone arches.
